allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('price:', d.get\('price'\), 'forwardPE:', d.get\('forwardPE'\), 'marketCap:', d.get\('marketCap'\), 'revenueGrowth:', d.get\('revenueGrowth'\), 'profitMargin:', d.get\('profitMargin'\), 'income rows:', len\(d.get\('incomeStatements',[]\)\)\)")
